title: SEC plans to scrap two NMS rules that hinder tokenized stock trading via DeFi AMMs
message_html: SEC plans to scrap two NMS rules that hinder tokenized stock trading via DeFi AMMs ...
snippet: The SEC proposed on 11 June to rescind two pillars of Regulation NMS for listed stock trading, the Rule 611 trade through rule and Rule 610(e). It opened a 60 day comment period. Rule 611 bars a trading venue from executing an order at a price worse than the best automated quote displayed at another
